title: Naaraaz
subTitle: Deva, a peasant, always fights for the welfare of his fellow villagers. Later, circumstances force him to flee to Malaysia where he locks horns with Taoke.

title: Angaar
subTitle: A slum dweller gets into a fight with thugs hired by a builder to clear the area. He later, finds himself waging a war against Mumabi's most powerful underworld family.

title: WAH Extraaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Plan
subTitle: Four friends Bobby, Lucky, Jai and Omi arrive in Mumbai with dreams of making it big. They kidnap a businessman hoping to extort money from him, but he turns out to be a gangster.

title: Bewares
subTitle: Lucky, nicknamed Bewars, is a aimless young man who frequently argues with his father about his dream of becoming a pilot.

title: Aaviri
subTitle: Following their eldest daughter's death, a family settles in an old house where the younger girl sees a ghost. The father must face his past to save her from a haunting entity.

title: Savyasachi
subTitle: One of Vikram's hands is not under the control of his mind. Being a victim of vanishing twin syndrome, Vikram's unseen twin brother comes through for him in the time of need.

title: Krishnarjuna Yudham
subTitle: Krishna and Arjun are lookalikes from different parts of the world, who must work together to find the women they love after they are kidnapped.

title: CID
subTitle: Some valuable jewels, which were a part of a royal family's heirloom, get stolen in spite of being installed with foolproof security. Soon, Team CID is called in to investigate the matter.

title: Rakhwala Pyar Ka
subTitle: A ventriloquist falls in love with a wealthy man's daughter. When she is forced to marry according to her family's wishes, the ventriloquist teams up with her uncle to save her.

title: Bhagmati Returns
subTitle: An aspiring filmmaker finds a producer for his horror movie and pitches the idea of a director being haunted by a ghost. However, the latter is unaware that the story is based on the former's life.

title: Shivagami
subTitle: A couple relocates to their ancestral Vizag bungalow, where an evil spirit possesses the wife, wreaking havoc on the family's newfound peace.

title: Operation Valentine
subTitle: Embarking on a deadly mission, Indian Air Force pilots put their lives on the line as they attempt to join forces to protect their country against rival entities.

title: Sinam
subTitle: A police sub-inspector investigates the sudden disappearance of his beloved wife. When he finds out what happened to her, he sets out to exact revenge against the culprit.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Street Dancer 3D
subTitle: Two rival dance groups, Street Dancer and Rule Breakers, despise each other and participate in a dance battle. Later, they decide to join hands for a greater cause.

subTitle: Amid efforts from bigots to limit schooling, a young teacher joins his father in their family legacy to continue ensuring equal education for all.

title: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
subTitle: A team of researchers is in Borneo to find the blood orchid, a flower that could hold the secret to eternal life. However, the scientists run afoul of the jungle's deadly snakes.

title: Gold Thief
subTitle: A gold appraiser discovers his grandfather's long-kept secret. Later, he decides to help him set things right, but he encounters several obstacles along the way.

title: M.C.K: Macharla Chunaav Kshetra
subTitle: A police officer is appointed as a district collector in Andhra Pradesh. Soon, he challenges a nefarious politician to end his corrupt activities.

title: Bheemla Nayak
subTitle: A battle begins between SI Bheemla Nayak, a righteous policeman, and Daniel Shekhar, an-ex havildar, when Daniel tricks Bheemla into surrendering to corruption.

title: Love Story
subTitle: A young man, who belongs to a wealthy family, falls in love with a woman. As they get involved in a romantic relationship, the couple are forced to deal with various challenges.

title: CID
subTitle: The alcoholic husband remains clueless about his wife's disappearance. Hardly getting out of his intoxicated universe, he lives in complete denial.
